description_long: This is a dark, metallic bust sculpture depicting an elderly man with a long, flowing beard and pronounced facial features. The figure's hair is long and textured, cascading down the back and sides, while the face is deeply set with furrowed brows and a solemn expression. The bust is mounted on a rectangular base, which appears to be made of a different, slightly lighter material. The surface of the sculpture is rough and matte, with visible tool marks and a weathered appearance. The overall form is robust and solid, suggesting durability and permanence. There is a small plaque or label on the front of the base, though its inscription is not legible in the images.
description: A dark metallic bust of an elderly bearded man with long hair, mounted on a rectangular base with a small plaque. The sculpture has a rough, matte surface and a solemn, detailed expression.
description_view_0: Left profile view showing the full length of the beard, the pronounced nose, and the textured hair flowing down the back.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the head and hair, with the rectangular base fully visible and no facial features shown.
description_view_2: Right profile view highlighting the opposite side of the face, beard, and hair, mirroring the left profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the detailed facial features, deep-set eyes, furrowed brows, and the plaque on the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an urban park, plaza, or indoor gallery.
